speaker: John
content: This is great. I got tons of homework tonight. It's easier to concentrate after sex.
mark: tons of 许多;无数的;一大堆
concentrate v. 集中注意力，聚精会神；使集中，聚集；浓缩

speaker: Gabrielle
content: I'm glad I could help. Education's very important.

speaker: John
content: Oh, I got something for you. I was gonna give it to you next time I mowed your lawn, but since you're here.

speaker: John
content: It's not just any rose. Look at all the petals, there are no flaws. It's perfect. Just like you.
mark: flaw n. 缺点，缺陷；裂痕，瑕疵

speaker: Alice
content: The truth hit her like a thunderbolt.
mark: thunderbolt n. 霹雳；雷电；突发意外事件；大发雷霆  thunder n. 雷，雷声 v. 打雷 bolt n. 闪电，霹雳

speaker: John
content: I had spent days looking for just what I want. Finally found it.

speaker: Alice
content: For John, this was no longer a meaningless little affair. Gabrielle could now clearly see he was falling in love with her.
mark: no longer 不再，不再是，不再存在
meaningless adj.无意义的；无目的的
affair n. 公共事务；私事；风流韵事；

speaker: Gabrielle
content: It's just beautiful. I got to go.
